scope: Refined contribution-vs-write split for the actual-LI-like compressed dKV rocWMMA route-grid probe on 1xMI350.

probe_change.change: Replace the contrib_sink shared-memory checksum reduction with one sampled scalar per route tile, and add --skip-grouped-atomic so raw-vs-contribution timing can avoid already-rejected grouped branches.
probe_change.why: The prior checksum sink added diagnostic reduction overhead. The sampled sink keeps the rocWMMA contribution tile live through store_matrix_sync while minimizing the non-dKV-write side work.

s64_smoke.read: The sampled sink is now a plausible low-overhead diagnostic at tiny shape: it is much cheaper than raw atomics and raw atomic parity passes against the reference.

s4096_actual_li_like_timing.read: For the split token_block=8 rocWMMA route-grid schedule, final global atomic writes are not the only wall. The per-selected contribution body itself is already about 95% of raw_atomic time, so coalescing final writes without changing the contribution schedule cannot move this branch toward the 4.7-7.1 ms MFMA floors.

decision.refined_diagnosis: The problematic unit is the selected-row accumulation algorithm: it produces KxD contributions for every selected token/group row, stores them through a route-grid body, and then writes dKV. The target-shape sampled split says the route-grid contribution production dominates this particular HIP/rocWMMA branch, while the final global atomic delta is only about 0.43 ms.
decision.implication_for_next_kernel: The next implementation must be MFMA-shaped at the group/tile level, not merely a wrapper that computes every selected contribution then coalesces the last write. It should aggregate selected rows into group/D16 work while preserving query-major reuse and avoiding selected-KV/prob/dense-route slabs.
keep_from_previous_contract: Preserve the query-major sparse-MLA/LI no-selected-state contract.
Avoid dense [H,S,G] route materialization and materialized selected partial slabs.
Use active-group metadata only if it stays sub-ms.
Beat the split raw-atomic floor of about 8.43 ms before promoting.
decision.next_branch: Build or prototype the 32x256/D16 materialized-prob smoke from the MFMA segmented reducer contract with contribution generation and tile-local/group-level accumulation fused together, then test S128/S512 parity before S4096 timing.
